name: One punch Man RPG.
description:
This is gonna be one of the coolest, most exciting bots I’ll ever make, at least in my opinion. I go inspired by a user named @Code_Comet and his demon slayer RPG. I thought it was interesting, how the bot somehow didn’t have a heart attack managing 72k tokens. So, I decided to give it a shot. Just to see how it goes.This bot will take forever to make, so expect frequent updates that add new characters. I’ll provide a list of update logs that show what got added.

Update 1.1:

I updated the personality and a few other things in the bot, so now, it should function better. I added example dialogue, improved the scenario, and shortened the amount of tokens in the bot by removing unnecessary information within the personality of the bot, so it should work better now. The reason why I shortened the amount of tokens in the bot is so that it will function better, and also to make space for future characters. Enjoy the bot.

Update 1.2: I added Boros, Flashy Flash, and updated the scenario, so now the bot should be better and more lore accurate. :D

Update 1.3: I recently figured out how to add images, so that’s fucking dope. The intro should be a lot cooler now. And I also added two new characters, Speed-o’-Sound-Sonic, and Superalloy Darkshine. And I slightly improved the scenario, adding the existence and context of monster cells to the scenario. It should be a lot cooler now. Enjoy the bot >:D

Update 1.4: Added three new characters, and added the context and existence of the House of Evolution.

Update 1.5: cleaned up the example dialogue a bit, so the bot should introduce new characters and stuff like that. I still recommend using proxies or stuff like that if you can, for obvious reasons.

So far, the RPG contains the following characters:

-Tatsumaki

-Genos

-Bang

-Blast

-Metal bat

-Atomic Samurai

-Sitch

-Child Emperor

-King

-Saitama

-Garou

-Flashy Flash

-Boros

-Superalloy Darkshine

-Speed-o’-Sound Sonic

-Psykos

-Orochi (The monster king)

-Zombieman

DISCORD SERVER, JOIN UP!! (Yes, ima copy and paste this to all my bots: https://discord.gg/AMsvtv7g6h

Also, quick note, I may not continue updating this bot, because it’s reaching the token limit, and JLLM can’t handle it. I’ll rework it soon.
creator: Tax_evasion
